rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 6, 2008 LINE 17. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF EXPOSURE. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO KENTILE. DENY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE FALSE REPRESENTATION AND INTENTIONAL TORT CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE ARTIGLO FACTORS. GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON PUNITIVE DAMAGES. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 6, 2008 LINE 17. DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY IS NOT SUFFICIENTLY DEVELOPED TO DO SO. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO OBTAIN RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES LIMITS DEFENDANT'S ABILITY TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 6, 2008 LINE 17. DEFENDANT B.R. FUNSTEN & CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AND DISCOVERY PROVIDED BEFORE THE PREFERENCE ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S PREFERENCE ORDER AS TO THE INDENTIFICATION OF WITNESSES MINIMIZES DEFENDANT'S OBLIGATION TO CONTACT AND DEPOSE WITNESSES. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: MAYA PRICKETT et al VS. GABRIEL YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 6, 2008 LINE 15. DEFENDANTS GABRIEL YU AND WAI CHEUNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE GIVEN THE TESTIMONY OF WAI HING CHEUNG 85:1-20 THAT REFLECTS AN UNCERTAINTY ABOUT FILING SUIT. THE RULINGS ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ARE AS FOLLOWS: FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION: DENIED, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON WHETHER THERE WAS AN OWNER MOVE-IN. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION: DENIED, THE ALLEGED FAILURE TO REPAIR WAS BREACHED WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD. THIRD AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION: GRANTED, THE CLAIMS ACCRUED WHEN PLAINTIFF MOVED IN AND THE PROBLEMS WERE NOT CORRECTED. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION: DENIED, THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED WITHIN ONE YEAR OF PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO CORRECT THE PROBLEMS IDENTIFIED BY DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTIONS. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION; DENIED, THE RETALIATION ALLEGEDLY OCCURRED WITHIN ONE YEAR OF THE SUIT BEING FILED. SEVENTH AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION: DENIED, BASED ON THE QUESTION OF FACT AS TO THE LAWFULNESS OF THE OWNER MOVE-IN. =(302/PJM/AY)
